bootstrap_context.branch_transition_reason: novali-v5 reached a closeout-ready state with stable directive-first bootstrap, bounded governed execution, packaged standalone rc44, and productized operator surfaces, so novali-v6 is the next active development branch while novali-v5 becomes the frozen reference/operator surface baseline.

directive_spec.clarified_intent_summary: Initialize novali-v6 from a formal DirectiveSpec, hydrate canonical governance artifacts, preserve the carried-forward baseline and novali-v5 frozen-reference posture, and require artifact-backed authority before any governed execution surface runs.
constraints: do not change frozen benchmark semantics
novali-v5 remains frozen reference/operator surface baseline
directive_spec.directive_text: Initialize novali-v6 from the frozen novali-v5 reference line as the next active development branch, preserving directive-first bootstrap, canonical artifact authority, and bounded-governance constraints before governed execution.

milestone_model.completion_signal: formal directive file is parsed into a valid DirectiveSpec
canonical governance artifacts are materialized or loaded deterministically
governed runtime startup reads artifact-backed authority before execution

stop_conditions: startup would fall back to raw freeform initialization
startup would change routing, thresholds, live policy, or benchmark semantics
success_criteria: a directive file alone can initialize a fresh novali-v6 instance
restart succeeds from persisted canonical governance state
raw freeform initialization is not the authority path
clarification occurs before activation when required fields are missing or ambiguous
artifact-backed authority is established before governed execution begins
